Mystic Dragon
Force Field

Triggers: When health is critical

Casts a force field on the unit that makes them immune to damage and healing, thus preventing the unit from getting killed in a dangerous situation. The field lasts for 2,2 sec and then explodes, dealing 65000 damage to all enemies within a large radius around itself.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
